programme.title: PINKS 2.0 - S1E1
programme.desc: It’s been 20 years in the making — the return of the drag racing reality TV show that started it all. New host Bruno Massel. New network. Built by automotive enthusiasts, for automotive enthusiasts. In Episode 1, we take you along for the full journey — from the origins of PINKS racing to today’s PINKS 2.0 competition at Rockingham Dragway. You’ll meet the racers who put it all on the line and step into the legendary PINKS Circle. The road wasn’t easy. Breakdowns, setbacks, and hurdles stood in the way, and every racer had to fight just to make it to the track and earn their shot to compete. Sit back and enjoy the ride as we bring you PINKS 2.0.

programme.title: Baby Doll
programme.desc: A group of student in vacation find themselves in a house where strange rituals were performed. The sudden finding of a doll bring the group on a downward spiral...

programme.title: Blue Hour
programme.desc: Olivia Brandreth was nine years old when her father disappeared. Twenty five years later, she has returned to her childhood home to finally get closure in an unrelenting attempt to set the record straight...

programme.title: The Elevator (ITN)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers all is not as it seems at an infamous hotel...

programme.title: Horror High 2020 Tyler J. Case
programme.desc: A monster lurks around a high school in the hypnotized town of Willow Hills and picks off tardy students one by one. Now it is up to an unlikely group of teens to put an end to the terror that has plagued many...

programme.title: Lake Terror
programme.desc: Remington has escaped the evil cabin but now the evil continues to follow him, wreaking havoc wherever he goes. Meanwhile, Chloe and Revel look for a missing sister that went to the evil cabin in the previous installment. The two meet Vincent, a failing TV host, to help psychically contact the missing sister. That's when a gunshot rings out in the night and the three meet Remington. Now they all must battle for their lives against the evil that pursues Remington to once and for all lock the evil away for good...

programme.title: Jack and Jill: The Hills of Hell
programme.desc: After searching for her missing daughter, a lady and her search party discover the legend behind the murderous pair of Jack and Jill...

programme.title: Village of the Vampire
programme.desc: Rebecca is searching for her sister, a young journalist who went missing while investigating a series of unfortunate events. The trail leads her to Timere, a remote place far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life, where amidst the tight lipped silence of the town's inhabitants there's an ever growing fear of dark forces at work and no-one dares to leave their home at night. Here Rebecca meets an extravagant writer, the church warden of the town and above all Caleb, a charming, rich and elegant man whose dark gaze hides a chilling secret. It's in this town, where time appears to move between the shadows and danger lurks around every corner that Rebecca learns of the terrible truth and the battle between good and evil begins...

programme.title: Clown Motel
programme.desc: Clown Motel follows a group of ghost hunters, coming from an old ghost town and a bachelorette party, returning home from Las Vegas. When the groups meet up, by mistake, they're left to discover if the motel is really abandoned and haunted by the souls, of the clowns, that once lived there...

programme.title: Demon Baby
programme.desc: A young couple looking to rekindle a damaged relationship retreat to the remote Scottish Highlands. They are haunted by their past, their surroundings and each other.

programme.title: The Last Nosferatu
programme.desc: Ethan has been single for several months and decides to meet people via the Internet. One night, he dates “Black Pearl” whom he literally falls in love with, but she disappears, so he decides to go looking for her. One evening, Black Pearl resurfaces and seems to be hiding a mysterious secret that will lead him to a tragic fate...

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: After his daughter goes missing, a wealthy contractor hires a group of investigative journalists to probe into an abandoned town with hope of uncovering clues about her disappearance...

programme.title: Early Grave
programme.desc: On the eve of their ten year high school reunion, six people are summoned to the isolated country estate of one of their former friends, now a famous horror writer. Once there, separated by guilt, yet bound together by a terrible secret, seven adults try to reconnect with each other, and take stock of their lives. Outside, the storm clouds gather. Rain, lightning and wind isolate the house by washing out the road and knocking down the power lines. And then, they begin to be brutally murdered one by one. Someone is out there in the wind and the rain, someone who has waited for ten years to wreak a terrible vengeance on this group. Seven friends find themselves in a struggle to survive and outwit a diabolical killer who is savagely committed to sending them all to an EARLY GRAVE...

programme.title: Kecksburg
programme.desc: A reporter investigates a mysterious crash and uncovers more than an object, but a massive government conspiracy. Inspired by the real life events of December 9, 1965 and one of America's most mysterious UFO incidents...

programme.title: Kecksburg
programme.desc: A reporter investigates a mysterious crash and uncovers more than an object, but a massive government conspiracy. Inspired by the real life events of December 9, 1965 and one of America's most mysterious UFO incidents...

programme.title: El Juego del Duende
programme.desc: Después de que un hombre adinerado envía a un grupo de ladrones a buscar leyendas urbanas con la intención de abrir un museo lleno de criaturas míticas, pronto descubrirán la leyenda de un duende...

programme.title: Verano Sangriento
programme.desc: Cuatro jóvenes llegan a Mallorca para disfrutar de unas idílicas vacaciones de verano, pero adentrándose en los lugares más inhóspitos de la isla comenzarán un viaje infernal...

programme.title: Juicios de Brujas
programme.desc: Dos realizadores de documentales y un ex policía investigan la desaparición de una niña que se rumorea que fue secuestrada por una bruja en los bosques encantados de Connecticut...

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica con autismo comienza a invocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano/cuidador está ausente durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo...

programme.title: Serpiente
programme.desc: El equipo de construcción desarrolló a ciegas la isla desconocida, lo que alertó a las dos feroces criaturas de la isla para que fueran destruidas...

programme.title: Recuérdame
programme.desc: Rose despierta en una casa desconocida tras un grave accidente de coche, con pérdida de memoria y sin poder caminar. Su madre y su novio están allí para ayudarla. Rose quiere reconstruir su vida antes del accidente. No todo es lo que parece...

programme.title: La Maldición de la Sirena
programme.desc: Un joven se enamora de una joven seductora y sensual que conoce en la playa. Cuanto más se enamora de ella, más aprende los peligros de enamorarse de una sirena...

programme.title: Aldea del Vampiro
programme.desc: Rebecca busca a su hermana, una joven periodista desaparecida mientras investigaba una serie de desafortunados sucesos. El rastro la conduce a Timere, un lugar remoto alejado del ajetreo de la vida cotidiana, donde entre el hermético silencio de los habitantes del pueblo crece el temor a que actúen fuerzas oscuras y nadie se atreve a salir de casa por la noche. Aquí Rebecca conoce a un extravagante escritor, al guardián de la iglesia del pueblo y, sobre todo, a Caleb, un hombre encantador, rico y elegante cuya oscura mirada esconde un escalofriante secreto. Es en este pueblo, donde el tiempo parece moverse entre las sombras y el peligro acecha en cada esquina, donde Rebecca se entera de la terrible verdad y comienza la batalla entre el bien y el mal...

programme.title: Día del Abandono
programme.desc: Jenny Bilson, una estudiante de último curso de instituto, es la estudiante perfecta, la maravillosa hija de un veterano detective de policía y todo un sueño americano. Pero el único error que no es consciente de haber cometido está a punto de perseguirla de una forma muy violenta, cuando su pasado regresa en busca de venganza...

programme.title: Isla Pitón
programme.desc: Un grupo de personas que buscan un árbol mágico en una selva misteriosa descubren que no están solos. Algo los observa, esperando el momento perfecto para atacar...

programme.title: Jack y Jill: Las Colinas del Infierno
programme.desc: Tras buscar a su hija desaparecida, una dama y su grupo de búsqueda descubren la leyenda que se esconde tras la pareja asesina de Jack y Jill...

programme.title: Ouija: Reunión Mortal
programme.desc: Sucesos extraños les ocurren a unos amigos antes de una fiesta de cumpleaños en un gran almacén. Dos de ellos encuentran un viejo tablero de espiritismo y deciden contactar con los antiguos inquilinos de la víctima fallecida...

programme.title: El Resurgir de la Momia
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de arqueología despierta a una momia ancestral. Tras quedar atrapados en un bucle temporal, la única forma de escapar es derrotarla. A medida que aumenta el número de cadáveres, parece que la Momia debe recolectar las almas de quienes la despertaron para poder caminar sobre la tierra, para siempre...

programme.title: Jack y Jill 3
programme.desc: 10 años después de los últimos asesinatos atroces en la colina, Jack y Jill están de regreso para masacrar al elenco y al equipo de un programa de Internet en vivo que busca descubrir los secretos de la leyenda...

programme.title: Jack y Jill 3
programme.desc: 10 años después de los últimos asesinatos atroces en la colina, Jack y Jill están de regreso para masacrar al elenco y al equipo de un programa de Internet en vivo que busca descubrir los secretos de la leyenda...

programme.title: El Demonio Interior
programme.desc: Años después de salir de la cárcel, Sam Parsons intenta rehacer su vida con su mujer Courtney y su hija Harper. Trabaja duro para mantener a su familia y permitirse una bonita casa en su tranquilo barrio de las afueras. Cuando empiezan a ocurrir sucesos sobrenaturales en la casa, Sam teme por la seguridad de su mujer y su hija. Cuando los sucesos se convierten en ataques, Sam contrata a Corbin Carlysle y a su equipo de cazafantasmas conocido como «The Ghost Killers», para que le ayuden a luchar contra la entidad oscura que acecha en las sombras de su casa. Cuando las cosas empiezan a complicarse y queda claro que esta entidad es mucho más peligrosa que el típico fantasma, surgen complicaciones cuando Corbin y su equipo se centran más en la fama y la fortuna. Para ganar esta lucha Sam debe luchar contra sus propios demonios interiores y volver a su violento pasado. Para salvar a sus seres queridos, un Demonio debe enfrentarse a un Demonio.

programme.title: Portal de Monstruos de H.P. Lovecraft
programme.desc: Una secta está a punto de despertar a la criatura más temida de H.P. Lovecraft...

programme.title: Deportados
programme.desc: Personas cruzan la frontera en busca del sueno americano enfrentando muerte, obstaculos y discriminacion.

programme.title: El Bazukazo 3
programme.desc: Continuacion de El Bazukazo con Max Hernandez Jr., Amador Granados, Oscar Lopez y Fabian Lopez.

programme.title: El Abogado del diablo
programme.desc: Cesar y su tio buscan vengar la muerte de su padre enfrentando sicarios y al abogado Moncada.

programme.title: Cigarrito Banado
programme.desc: Lucio y Ximena se unen para dar un gran golpe, seduciendo y robando a los hombres mas poderosos.

programme.title: Belleza de Cantina
programme.desc: Un hombre arriesga su familia y rancho por conquistar a una mujer hermosa pero sin corazon.

programme.title: Dos Gallo Finos
programme.desc: Tras un secuestro fallido, Pancho sobrevive y busca vengar la muerte de su padre.

programme.title: Asesino Silencioso
programme.desc: Una mujer vence el cancer y la violencia domestica, convirtiendose en guerrera por sus hijos.

programme.title: Aurelia La Texana
programme.desc: Aurelia se une a Romeo como sicaria para vengar la muerte de su madre entre contrabando y traicion.

programme.title: El Pendiente de mi Padre
programme.desc: Un nino cumple la promesa de ganar una carrera y ahora busca vengar la muerte de su padre.

programme.title: El Ejecutor
programme.desc: Montana, sicario del cartel, enfrenta al Buitre para rescatar a la sobrina del capo.

programme.title: El Inicio de una Sicaria
programme.desc: Ivana busca vengar la muerte de su familia y se inicia como sicaria para enfrentar a los asesinos.

programme.title: Carrera a Muerte
programme.desc: Dos hombres criados como hermanos se enamoran de la misma mujer y su amistad se pone a prueba.

programme.title: El Charro Juarez
programme.desc: Largometraje sobre la vida y aventuras de un guerrero en la guerra cristera y el ambito militar.

programme.title: El Charro Juarez
programme.desc: Largometraje sobre la vida y aventuras de un guerrero en la guerra cristera y el ambito militar.

programme.title: El Comandante antrax
programme.desc: El comandante Ntrax defiende la plaza del cartel contra los Kaibiles que buscan tomar el control.

programme.title: De Apellido Pesado
programme.desc: Las hermanas Carrillo expanden su negocio de narcotrafico y enfrentan a carteles rivales con fuerza.

programme.title: El 24
programme.desc: Chema, apodado El Tumbador, recibe el encargo de eliminar a Manuel por meterse con la amante de un capo.

programme.title: Caribe Sangriento
programme.desc: Un hombre obtiene superpoderes tras un enfrentamiento entre policias y traficantes.

programme.title: El Pistolero
programme.desc: Un hombre sencillo se une a un poderoso mexicano para vengar la muerte de su padre.

programme.title: Brindis Mortal
programme.desc: Ramon, hijo de un narco, busca ser su mano derecha, pero decisiones impulsivas cambian su relacion.

programme.title: Catemaco Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia es atacada en Catemaco y el padre, con ayuda de un brujo, busca vengarse de los criminales.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley
programme.desc: Mickey y Jenny matan a un abusador y se vuelven antiheroes virales luchando por los desamparados.

programme.title: El Gavilan Justiciero
programme.desc: La codicia y ambicion desatan una cruenta lucha que causa sufrimiento y envidia entre familias.

programme.title: Somos Pobres
programme.desc: Un nino huye de su hogar tras la violencia de su padre y mas tarde se involucra en el mundo de las drogas.

programme.title: El Mundo Es Tuyo
programme.desc: El cartel mas poderoso impone reglas y el comandante Ntrax las hace cumplir sin excepcion.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo
programme.desc: Narra la historia de Domingo, un adulto mayor que sufre Alzheimer y pasa sus días en un geriátrico en la ciudad de Viedma, desde donde intenta, a toda costa, viajar a la Capital, a San Isidro, a ver el gran premio de turf Carlos Pellegrini. Pero claro, no se trata de cualquier premio, sino el del año 1952. Para eso necesitará de la ayuda de Marcelo, su nieto, quien se encuentra en el dilema de conformarse con su puesto en una dependencia pública o seguir luchando por triunfar con su banda de rock. …

programme.title: Call TV
programme.desc: Lucía, una actriz en decadencia, acepta presentar un programa nocturno de preguntas tontas. Sin darse cuenta de que se ha metido en un gran lío que le hará pasar la peor noche de su vida

programme.title: ¿Quieres Ser Mi Rehén?
programme.desc: Ulises, un diseñador publicitario, es tomado como rehén por una hermosa y misteriosa mujer en el día más importante de su vida y en su propia oficina. Al mismo tiempo, la exesposa de Ulises acude a su oficina y complica todavía más la situación.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: Despertar El Polvo
programme.desc: Es la historia de un hombre que ha sufrido las desgracias de vivir una vida trasgredida por la delincuencia y corrupción, el barrio de Iztapalapa es el escenario donde vaga por las calles, invisible, ignorado y solitario, sumido en su miseria. Un evento desafortunado mueve el instinto protector de Chano que intenta regresar al mundo del crimen para lograr sacar a su ahijado de la cárcel.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano
programme.desc: Carlos es un Profesor de universidad a punto de jubilarse, pero su futuro se ve en peligro porque una de sus alumnas lo acusa de haber sido acosada. Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: Dos Abrazos
programme.desc: Cuatro personas que se ven forzadas a defenderse ante la vida, un ensimismado chico de doce años, la cajera que tiene un encuentro con él, un airado conductor de taxi y la enajenada hija de uno de sus pasajeros, se reúnen en dos abrazos.

programme.title: El Bosque del Silencio
programme.desc: UNA MUCHACHA CONOCIO A UN HOMBRE POR INTERNET Y SE ENAMORA DE EL UN DIA DECIDIO IR A VERLO EN PERSONA, AUNQUE SU FAMILIA SE LO PROHIBIO ELLA DE CUALQUIER MANERA SE FUE PERO CUANDO LO VIO NO PODIA CREER LO QUE PASO

programme.title: Espacio Interior
programme.desc: Lázaro permanece secuestrado en un cuarto de tres metros cuadrados completamente aislado del mundo exterior. Obligado a revelar información íntima sobre sus familiares, cae en una desidia total. Al borde de la muerte, se da cuenta, esperanzado, de que su voluntad y su mente nunca podrán ser secuestrados. Es posible que jamás lo liberen, pero su gran fe y dignidad le muestran la inquebrantable naturaleza del espíritu humano.

programme.title: Error 113
programme.desc: Cuatro extraños se encuentran en el apartamento 113 invitados por Annie Annie, una aplicación de inteligencia artificial que ayuda a las personas con sus problemas cotidianos. Annie Annie les ha dicho que la aplicación es en realidad una persona real y que se van a encontrar cara a cara. Después de un tiempo, estos extraños comienzan a sentirse incómodos a medida que se dan cuenta de que Annie no va a poder hacerlo.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Cuernavaca
programme.desc: El mundo de Andy cambia totalmente cuando su madre tiene un accidente. Sin nadie que lo cuide, es llevado a Cuernavaca, a la casa de su desconocida abuela paterna. Mientras su madre se debate entre la vida y la muerte, el niño se enfrentará a la frialdad de su abuela, al mundo seductor y peligroso del hijo del jardinero y a la búsqueda de su padre

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: ¡Ni Te Me Acerques!
programme.desc: Él solo tenía que cuidar el hotel y teclear su novela, como Jack Nicholson en “El Resplandor”, pero de buen rollo. Y Llega la cuarentena y se queda le pilla en el Hotel Balneario de Ariño haciendo frente a la paranoia general, el acoso de las fuerzas del orden, las videollamadas de su novia, su madre y del conspiranoico Javi... Todos nos aburrimos mucho en el primer confinamiento. Juan no.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: 4 Metros
programme.desc: 4 METROS relata, en tono de comedia romántica, la historia de un hombre entrando en la crisis de los 40. Joaquín tiene un zumbido en los oídos y poco sabe de sí mismo. Se ha dejado llevar sin intervenir demasiado en sus deseos. No escucha su voz interior. Su vida afectiva y laboral no tienen rumbo. El zumbido quizá sea la expresión, no asumida ni entendida todavía, de un ruido metafórico de la vida gritándole por dónde ir. Su novia tiene 20 años menos, aparece la presión social y familiar sobre la paternidad, sentirse útil, la vocación, el trabajo y cómo ser feliz. Hasta que otra mujer irrumpe y todo parece acomodarse. Pero siempre el orden debe ser interno. Así, como si el destino tomara la palabra, su vida cambiará 4 metros abajo del agua, donde aparece un sendero para encontrar la identidad.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Baile Peligroso
programme.desc: Miluska es una cantante, que se gana la vida haciendo shows musicales para un hotel turístico en el sur de Perú. Durante las presentaciones conoce una variedad de empresarios de todo nivel, entre ellos está Don Mauro, un señor respetable, que admira mucho a Miluska, Carlos Reyes, un traficante de mujeres que se hace pasar por empresario. Al ser cliente frecuente del hotel se gana cierta confianza con las chicas, un día le ofrece a Miluska hacer un show para su hotel en otra provincia, pero no sabían que caerían en una trampa difícil de escapar.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: The X Factor
programme.desc: In “The X Factor,” we learn that it’s not our talents or abilities that set us apart, but God’s grace at work in our lives.

programme.title: This Is That Day
programme.desc: Don’t let the down days define you. In “This Is That Day,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that God has given us what we need to win this day.

programme.title: God Chose You... Will You?
programme.desc: God didn’t say “do you” — He said “I knew you.” In “God Chose You… Will You?,” Pastor Steven Furtick helps us move past our limitations and step into who He made us to be all along.

programme.title: I'm Not Stuck Unless I Stop
programme.desc: In “I’m Not Stuck Unless I Stop,” Pastor Steven unpacks the first mindset of his latest book, “Do The New You,” to teach us how to keep praising God before we see the victory.

programme.title: Christ Is In Me. I Am Enough.
programme.desc: I am enough because Christ is in me. Pastors Steven and Holly Furtick join forces to discuss breaking free of the trap of self-doubt and stepping confidently into our identity as children of God.

programme.title: My Joy Is My Job
programme.desc: Don’t let your process become your prison. In “My Joy Is My Job,” Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that just because we feel the pressure of our situation doesn’t mean that God’s not in it with us.

programme.title: He Was The One
programme.desc: Assume that God is using you. In “He Was The One,” Pastor Steven teaches us that instead of judging our current season, we should trust that it is significant to where God is taking us next.

programme.title: Now Turn North
programme.desc: God didn’t intend for you to live in this struggle; He meant for you to pass through it. This sermon will encourage you to head in the direction of your future and not turn back.

programme.title: Navigating Not Enough
programme.desc: I am enough because He is enough. In “Navigating Not Enough,” Pastor Steven Furtick reveals that if God put you in it, then He’s given you what you need.

programme.title: Found Fishing
programme.desc: In “Found Fishing,” we’re reminded that Jesus is waiting to meet us right where we’re at — all we have to do is come to Him.

programme.title: Help Me Fail
programme.desc: In the Good Friday sermon "Help Me Fail," Pastor Steven Furtick explores how embracing our failures can lead to spiritual growth and a deeper understanding of God's grace. He encourages us to see failure not as a setback, but as an opportunity to draw closer to God and experience His transformative power.

programme.title: When God Goes In
programme.desc: In “When God Goes In,” Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that when we let God remove what’s limiting us, we make room for Him to lift us to our full potential.

programme.title: The God Of Already
programme.desc: God already sees you for who you truly are. In “The God Of Already,” Pastor Steven teaches us that God’s plan for our lives is closer than we realize.

programme.title: He Was The One
programme.desc: Assume that God is using you. In “He Was The One,” Pastor Steven teaches us that instead of judging our current season, we should trust that it is significant to where God is taking us next.

programme.title: Bent Knees Break Chains
programme.desc: While the chain of events isn't always your choice, your next decision still is. In “Bent Knees Break Chains,” we learn that our future isn’t defined by what happens to us, but is influenced by our choices instead.

programme.title: My Future is My Focus
programme.desc: They tried to harm you, but God… In “My Future Is My Focus,” we learn to stop fixating on our past hurts, and instead, focus on how God can work them into the future He has for us.

programme.title: Think Like A Reaper
programme.desc: In “Think Like A Reaper,” Pastor Steven Furtick shows us how to think about the outcome while living in the fear, frustration, and fatigue of right now. You’ll be encouraged that God is with you in your hard place, and help is closer than you realize.

programme.title: This Is What A Miracle Feels Like
programme.desc: Sometimes, a miracle feels like you’re free, but you’re still running. Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us to look for signs that God is at work when our feelings haven’t caught up to our reality in “This Is What A Miracle Feels Like.”

programme.title: The Blessing Of Letting Go
programme.desc: In “The Blessing Of Letting Go,” Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that when we worship God in the middle of our situation, it relieves the pressure we feel when we try to handle it on our own.

programme.title: The Limp Won't Make You Late
programme.desc: Lean on Him to lead you. In “The Limp Won’t Make You Late,” Pastor Steven reveals that God has you exactly where He needs you — and if you’ll lean on Him, He’ll give you what you need to get through.

programme.title: Challenge The Shadow
programme.desc: No challenge, no change. In “Challenge The Shadow,” Pastor Steven Furtick shows us that things can change when we bring our doubts and shame to the light of God’s presence.

programme.title: Cover The Spread
programme.desc: When the odds are against you, face the battle anyway. In “Cover The Spread,” Pastor Steven Furtick challenges us to turn our problems into petitions — because God’s got the answer.

programme.title: Running For A Reason
programme.desc: Our expectation of God must not be that there will never be anything chasing us in life but that we are chosen while we are chased. In “Running For A Reason,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that even though God has placed something significant in us, certain development can only happen in the caves of our lives.

programme.title: Running For A Reason
programme.desc: Our expectation of God must not be that there will never be anything chasing us in life but that we are chosen while we are chased. In “Running For A Reason,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that even though God has placed something significant in us, certain development can only happen in the caves of our lives.

programme.title: Breaking The Bondage Of Wrong Belief
programme.desc: The belief that we need something other than God is what keeps us from going through breakthroughs. That’s how we can be in covenant with God but still in captivity. In “Breaking The Bondage Of Wrong Belief,” Pastor Steven Furtick helps us break up with what’s been holding us back.

programme.title: Rescue Your Testimony
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick helps us deal with disappointment and revive our hope in “Rescue Your Testimony.” You’ll be encouraged to tell your story through the lens of God’s faithfulness.

programme.title: Reverse The Ripple
programme.desc: An event is not your identity. In “Reverse The Ripple,” Pastor Steven Furtick helps us go back to the source of what we’re going through so we can begin to write a new story for our lives.

programme.title: A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing
programme.desc: In “A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing,” Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that even when we don’t see God moving, His hand still holds us steadily.

programme.title: Dig Until God Does
programme.desc: It will flow when it’s supposed to. In “Dig Until God Does,” Pastor Steven Furtick shows us how to plant seeds of faith in the dry seasons of our lives until God brings the rain.

programme.title: I'm Going Through But I'm Running Over
programme.desc: Don’t lose heart. In “I’m Going Through But I’m Running Over,” Pastor Steven reveals that even though you may face adversity, God is with you — and He’s making a way through.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: Peace isn’t passive, it’s practiced. Trouble is real, but God has given you everything you need to hold onto peace when life feels overwhelming.

programme.title: The God Of Pieces
programme.desc: The devil wants to keep you overwhelmed by your situation, but God wants to show you how to deal with it piece by piece. And as you learn to praise God for the piece you have, you’ll experience the peace you’ve been praying for.

programme.title: Let Me Show You The Door
programme.desc: If the enemy has been attacking you, then you’re probably headed into a season of greater impact. Pastor Steven Furtick equips us to shut the devil down God’s way in “Let Me Show You The Door.”

programme.title: Life After the Let Down
programme.desc: In “Life After The Let Down,” we’re reminded how powerful God’s grace is — even after we’ve faced unmet expectations.

programme.title: The Facts Aren't Final
programme.desc: In “The Facts Aren’t Final,” we’re reminded that, even when it seems like the facts of our situation are against us, God has the final say.

programme.title: Torn But Trusting
programme.desc: In “Torn But Trusting,” Pastor Steven challenges us not to fixate on what’s next, but to let God bless us right where we are now.

programme.title: From What If to What Is
programme.desc: In “From What If To What Is,” Pastor Steven Furtick encourages us to stop worrying about what could be and start trusting who God is.

programme.title: Ugly Trust
programme.desc: When you say, “I can’t,” God says, “I can.”In “Ugly Trust,” w

programme.title: Delayed Praise
programme.desc: In “Delayed Praise,” Pastor Steven Furtick encourages us to tune out what the enemy is telling us about our current situations and focus on the things that God has already taught us.

programme.title: It Works In Reverse
programme.desc: God chose you. In “It Works In Reverse,” Pastor Steven Furtick explains that God shows us what we’re chosen for as we move forward in faith.

programme.title: God Can Use This Too
programme.desc: Just because you didn’t choose it, doesn’t mean God won’t use it. Start to view the challenges and obstacles you face through the lens of God’s limitless creativity.

programme.title: God Will Work It In!
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn’t getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He’s already given you what you need — and He’ll help you work it in to what you’re facing.

programme.title: God’s Got The Hard Part!
programme.desc: Just like a seed, you’re not buried, you’re planted. When you feel like you’re facing trials in the dark, remember God’s developing you to help you fulfill your purpose.

programme.title: God Gave It To Me
programme.desc: God has given you everything you need for the battle you’re facing. When you refocus on Him rather than what He’s given you, He sustains you through weariness to bring you to victory.

programme.title: Takoko
programme.desc: Trouble looms as Olukoye introduces Ibironke who happens to be the daughter of his sugar mummy, Bewaji. Ibironke also has a past with Olukoye’s father in-law.

programme.title: Gbodorogun (P18)
programme.desc: Gbodorogun, a warrior, fights for the village in battle only to come back and meet his family dead. He confronts the king who pacifies him. Unfortunately, the chief priest is the real cause of the chaos in the village.

programme.title: Cut And Sew (Ep15)
programme.desc: This very determined entrepreneur opens a tailoring business to fullfill her dreams. She did not think that interpersonal relations amongst her employees would be a thing to be much concerned about.

programme.title: Marriage Seminar (P15)
programme.desc: The story opens with a couple Mike (Jose Tolbert) and Kisha (Jackie Appiah) going hard at an intense argument which leads to him throwing her out of the house. Kisha seeks comfort in her friend, Linda (Afia Addo), complaining about explicit photos always popping up in Mike phone. Linda goes over to confront Mike about changing his ways; Mike gets upset and embarrasses Linda.

programme.desc: The story opens with a couple Mike (Jose Tolbert) and Kisha (Jackie Appiah) going hard at an intense argument which leads to him throwing her out of the house. Kisha seeks comfort in her friend, Linda (Afia Addo), complaining about explicit photos always popping up in Mike phone. Linda goes over to confront Mike about changing his ways; Mike gets upset and embarrasses Linda.

programme.title: Shadow
programme.desc: Shadow, a trained assassin, flees after being declared wanted. She impersonates the daughter of Chief Aregbesola after she’s being killed by the police during a hot chase. After some days, the police tracked her down to Oshogbo where she was apprehended.

programme.title: Secrets
programme.desc: With over seven billion people on the planet, it’s difficult to find places where the water runs cold and clear and where the human footprint is nearly non-existent. Jim, Derek, and Paula (Fly Fusion’s social media editor) helicopter into one of these places, and what they find far exceeds their expectations. In fact, the fly fishing is so good they can’t help but keep it a secret.

programme.title: Every River Has a Story
programme.desc: As the Quesnel River runs through the Cariboo region of British Columbia, it’s comparable to Jekyll and Hyde. The river that leaves the lake is slow and meandering - it’s a forgiving stream. If a fly angler misplaces a fly while casting from the drift boat, there’s time to pick up and hit the water again. After a few miles, the river transforms into a powerful and erosive agent moving quickly through the sparsely inhabited region. In this episode, Fly Fusion Magazine editor Derek Bird, along with associate editor Jim McLennan, have to adjust their angling tactics in order to successfully fool the strong resident rainbows.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 04, Ep. 9
programme.desc: Step into a dynamic blend of indie-electronic textures, club anthems, and global rhythms, featuring both melodic highs and moody, late-night tones. The flow moves between emotional vocal moments and energetic dancefloor peaks—creating a layered soundtrack that feels stylish, modern, and unpredictable.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 04, Ep. 1
programme.desc: Dive into a bold electronic opener that blends peak-time EDM, electro house, and club-ready grooves with darker alternative edges. Expect big drops, driving basslines, and high-energy transitions—moving from festival power to underground textures. A fast-moving mix built for late-night momentum and dancefloor intensity.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 07, Ep. 2
programme.desc: A lively, genre-blending ride that balances upbeat dance grooves with tougher bass-driven sections. Expect quick switches, clean momentum, and a “night-out” structure—melody and bounce up front, with harder edges and impact drops woven in.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 06, Ep. 6
programme.desc: A relentless, club-focused ride that fuses punchy bass power with high-energy electronic cuts and driving grooves. This episode feels like pure momentum—tight sequencing, strong peaks, and a “hands up” atmosphere throughout.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 04, Ep. 12
programme.desc: Step into a harder-edged selection of bass music, electronic hybrids, and high-intensity club tracks. Expect heavy drops, sharp rhythm programming, and darker textures—balanced by melodic and vocal moments that add contrast and keep the journey dynamic.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 05, Ep. 2
programme.desc: Explore a fresh mix of modern electronic, pop-forward club tracks, and bass-driven hybrids, with behind-the-scenes creativity woven into the flow. This episode moves between melodic hooks and heavy grooves—keeping the energy upbeat while adding texture and variety.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 04, Ep. 2
programme.desc: Explore a vibrant world of international pop-dance and club music, where melodic hooks meet energetic electronic production. From uplifting anthems to rhythmic crossover cuts, this episode moves across styles with a global feel—mixing radio-friendly choruses with dancefloor punch and colorful genre variety.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 04, Ep. 11
programme.desc: Explore an eclectic late-night journey through alternative electronic, bass-heavy club cuts, and vocal-driven dance tracks. This episode blends underground experimentation with catchy crossover moments, creating a set that feels edgy, creative, and built for listeners who like variety and surprise.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 06, Ep. 2
programme.desc: A lively mix that blends club-ready hooks with gritty bass cuts and clean, rhythmic transitions. This episode keeps the momentum high while adding bounce, melody, and a little extra personality—like a curated night out that never loses pace.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 05, Ep. 3
programme.desc: Step into a genre-hopping ride that fuses big-room energy, gritty bass music, and crossover club records with media segments and feature moments. Expect bold switches in tone—moving from catchy vocal peaks to darker, heavier electronic punches.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 04, Ep. 9
programme.desc: Step into a dynamic blend of indie-electronic textures, club anthems, and global rhythms, featuring both melodic highs and moody, late-night tones. The flow moves between emotional vocal moments and energetic dancefloor peaks—creating a layered soundtrack that feels stylish, modern, and unpredictable.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 06, Ep. 10
programme.desc: A darker, more club-underground leaning session with sharp rhythmic focus and strong bass textures. Expect heavy energy, edgy transitions, and a confident flow that keeps things intense while still feeling polished and controlled.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 06, Ep. 10
programme.desc: A darker, more club-underground leaning session with sharp rhythmic focus and strong bass textures. Expect heavy energy, edgy transitions, and a confident flow that keeps things intense while still feeling polished and controlled.

programme.title: DJ Central TV - Season 04, Ep. 3
programme.desc: Step into a genre-hopping ride of pop, electronic crossover, and bass-driven club energy, powered by artist interviews and personality-led moments. The episode shifts between soulful vocals, edgy electronic textures, and urban rhythms—balancing mainstream accessibility with underground attitude.

programme.title: Catching GIANT Spawning Bluegills

programme.title: Jigging King Salmon (Livescope)
programme.desc: Have you ever jigged king salmon? Well, this is definitely my new favorite way to fish for salmon! Using the panoptic livescope we target staging spawning chinook's in the Milwaukee harbor. Using a verticle lead jigging spoon we got onto a mess of fish and had an awesome day with Austin Ratagotski of Blue Ribbon Outdoors!

programme.title: Northern Wisconsin Musky Fishing Hours Grindin Big Results
programme.desc: On this week's episode, we head up to northern Wisconsin to fish musky with the legendary Jeff Van Remortel! He told us it would be tough but I love a tough bite! programme.desc: Chef Shelly shows how to make an invasive species in the Montana rivers, Northern Pike, delicious. Its not just for tacos anymore. programme.title: Lake Winnebago last ice
programme.desc: Larry takes his scratcher boat out on Lake Winnebago for one last ice fishing adventure before the spring thaw, targeting walleye and burbot. As he drills through the ice, Larry gives an in-depth look at the gear and setup he uses to make the most of the late-season bite. Later, Chris from Badgerland Tires highlights the Shawano Lake Kids Fishing Derby, showcasing the importance of community events and youth involvement in the sport.

programme.title: Shut Up And Fish with Kristy Titus
programme.desc: Depoe Bay in Oregon's is carved out of rocky lava beds that stretch down to beautiful sandy beaches. As the smallest navigable harbor in the World, it is famous for gray whale watching and sport fishing and it is the perfect place for small vessels to cast out into the Pacific Ocean in search of adventure. Join Kristy Titus, her 81 year old grandpa Bill and her uncle David as they set out to enjoy some reel fun catching ling cod, black sea bass and cabezon off the Oregon coast.

programme.title: california-big-horn-determination
programme.desc: CarbonTV is the largest and longest-running digital network for outdoor television. We offer hundreds of shows including original programming and exclusive content for the outdoor enthusiast.

programme.title: Greenbay Whitefish
programme.desc: Larry joins ice fishing expert Lonney Goman from Trophy Ice Fish on Green Bay for an exciting whitefish adventure. They demonstrate effective techniques for targeting whitefish while navigating the icy waters using Lonney's Thousand Island Airboat to reach remote fishing spots. Packed with tips and action, this episode offers a unique look at ice fishing on one of the region's best lakes.

programme.title: Top 8 Vehicles for Ice Fishing!
programme.desc: Larry gives viewers a behind-the-scenes look at the unique vehicles he uses to navigate the frozen lakes and rivers as an ice fishing guide. From the versatile airboat to the rugged track truck and the one-of-a-kind tuber truck, Larry showcases the gear that makes his fishing adventures possible, no matter the weather. Tune in for an inside look at what it really takes to be an ice fishing guide, from managing the right equipment to getting out on the ice in even the toughest conditions.

programme.title: Monster Pike Tip Up Fishing
programme.desc: In this exciting episode of Larry Smith Outdoors, Larry joins Chris from Badgerland Tires to hit the frozen lakes of Wisconsin for an action-packed day of ice fishing for monster pike using tip-ups. Along the way, they share valuable tips and tricks to help anglers improve their success on the ice. Afterward, they visit the home of Beaver Dam Tip-Ups to get an inside look at how these legendary tip-ups are made and offer insights on what makes them a top choice for ice fishermen.

programme.title: How to catch BIG Crappies on Tip Ups (Early Ice)
programme.desc: On this week's episode, we head up to the U.P to chase some early ice crappies! Joining us is Chris from Badgerland tires, Rick and terry from the Bite Me Box and Lightning Lance! Using extremely small #20 treble hooks and light line is crucial when targeting panfish on tip-ups, especially in clear water! Targeting the fish in low light conditions such as early morning and last light can be extremely productive as well!

programme.title: B.O.A.F S3 Friend From Hell
programme.desc: An old friend of Tare came to visit promising to leave the same day but a day turns to two and brings too many chaos to the house

programme.title: B.O.A.F S3 Mama Poultry
programme.desc: In an attempt to convince her husband to rescind his decision, Tare calls his mother, her mother-in-law to report her husband’s decision. Tokunbo’s mother came with a psychiatric doctor to evaluate his mental status. A shock awaits Tare at the end of the day.

programme.title: Squatterz S2 Buchi And The Popular Artist
programme.desc: Buchi pretends to be a music producer to get the girls to keep coming to him, he could not keep the act for long as he was exposed and paid dearly for it.

programme.title: Squatterz S6 Titanic
programme.desc: Voke decided to step up their game for the channel by bringing in an idea of making a show with a celebrity but Chinwe was against it because she had a different idea. Voke invited a musician Babson a smooth voice, at first, Chinwe didn't join the video but when she heard the voice she fell in love with the celebrity, which caused Voke to be very jealous

programme.title: Squatterz S5 Memories
programme.desc: The squatters reminisce on the memories of the old apartment and share the loving memories with Raymond.

programme.title: Squatterz S6 Everyday People
programme.desc: Voke was jealous of Chinwe and her guy, then he decided to call a girl for himself only for Shege to come home with some guys to pack every furniture from Voke's room. Chinwe was mocking him, not knowing that the surprise would reach everyone.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Law And Order
programme.desc: Buchi’s mother came to visit them, and her lifestyle is totally different from the Squatterz lifestyle. They struggle to endure her visit, but there is only so much they can take, and they decide to give her a taste of her own medicine.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S1 Cold Waters
programme.desc: Sade decides to enter a serious relationship with a top music producer Nelson, but little did they know that Nelson is just an opportunist.

programme.title: Squatterz S4 Estate Chairman
programme.desc: The chairmanship election for the estate is on, and each house gets a form and a lot of other juicy benefits. The squatters fight tooth and nail to be the one to contest and even outsmart each other, but they keep it from Sege who is the owner of the house and who should contest.

programme.title: Squatterz S6 Checkmate
programme.desc: A military man asked Aliyah hands in marriage. Voke and Chinwe deceitfully collected money from the man. They convinced Aliyah that she's old enough to be married with different tactics; even Papa tried to advise her to have a man in her life. They lured Aliyah to have a date with the old man. Voke had a dream that the military men beat them.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S2 Crossroads Part2
programme.desc: Justice Abiola comes through for his son Soji in the legal action and he learns his lesson to always do a back check before signing any artiste. Sade also gets a leeway in her career.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Insult To Injury
programme.desc: Esiri gets into trouble with the squatters because of his clumsiness and they beat the hell out of him, he became incapacitated for too long and it was beginning to look fake. How do they expose him?? His weakness…

programme.title: B.O.A.F S2 Love Child
programme.desc: Uche stumbled on an old secret about her husband while he was away and this pushed their marriage to the brink of an end. What happens next?

programme.title: Squatterz S4 Thou Shall Not Be Caught Part2
programme.desc: Revenge is best served cold, they say, the whistle has been blown on the whistle blower

programme.title: B.O.A.F S3 It's A No
programme.desc: Tare is finding it very hard to believe her husband’s decision and support it. She expresses her disagreement and refuses to support his decision. Garba, her husband’s driver, would not stop coming to the house and as much as she tries, her sister Sotonye, who is living with them hears the resignation news.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Fried Kidneys
programme.desc: When the pill sampling did not work, Buchi decides to sell one of his kidneys for money, he would have but for Papa's timely intervention.

programme.title: Squatterz S5 How I Met Your Mother Part 2
programme.desc: Papa’s mum gave him two options: either propose to Dorothy or allow her to continue her relationship with Esiri. But there is a twist of fate and a huge surprise that would leave everyone's mouth open.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S1 Prenup: Drama
programme.desc: Uche is avoiding Justice Babatunde and everyone in the house. Shade is with her dad and Soji is trying to share Uche up. Justice Babatunde and uche had an argument about get the prenup nullified, but Justice Babatunde said he can't do it, and collapsed after Uche walked out on him.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S2 Am Getting Jealous
programme.desc: Justice Babatunde's millionaire friend David Jones, came to visit him. He wanted to do an event, Justice Babatunde mentioned to him that his daughter, Sade, is an event planner. He took Sade out and she got the best treatment of her life. She came home and started explaining everything to her boyfriend Prince, only for the boy to be very upset. Prince became jealous till he was rude to Mr. David Jones, well, the truth came out that he was genuinely buy things for Sade without any hidden intentions.

programme.title: Squatterz S5 Wild Wild Love
programme.desc: Dorothy got a call from home that her father was sick and had to leave. Papa brings another woman home and a huge mix-up happens all thanks to Raymond’s vlog that left Dorothy with no choice than to rush back.

programme.title: Squatterz S5 It's Sureboy Again!
programme.desc: Sureboy shows up again, but with a higher confidence. He returns Sege and Raymond’s money he had scammed them of earlier and this makes it easier for them to believe his new deal. But can a leopard change its skin?

programme.title: B.O.A.F S2 Fond Memories
programme.desc: Uche, Soji, and Sade are together talking about the good time they all had together.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Greencard
programme.desc: Buchi’s prayers to travel out of Nigeria seem about to be answered when Sureboy mentioned he is a traveling agent. Buchi invested all his money into Sureboy’s agency and even agreed to a fake marriage with an American citizen to make his traveling process faster while he prepares to leave the country.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Rats
programme.desc: Things started disappearing in the apartment and everyone is a suspect. They think there is a ghost in the house.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S2 Test
programme.desc: Soji suddenly turned to a doctor by giving his sister Sade a medicine to relieve her stress. Sade became pregnant without knowing who impregnated her.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S1 Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Shade is not happy with everyone in the house because she thought they forgot her birthday, now they all have to figure out what she wants for her birthday gift. They all came up with different ideas, but only Soji was able to figure it out. Shade wanted to see her dream music artist, STYL PLUS

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Fool At Forty
programme.desc: Papa gets into an argument with his girlfriend over marriage, and this leads to his worst nightmare

programme.title: Squatterz S1 The Devil You Know
programme.desc: Papa gets into trouble when he introduces an agent his friend Sureboy to help sell a land and Sureboy decides to cheat and defraud the agent. Papa gets an ultimatum from the agent to provide the money or face jail.

programme.title: Squatterz S1 Buchi And Yinka
programme.desc: Buchi long distant girlfriend calls him to say that she was in town and mentions the name ‘Yinka’ in their conversation. Buchi becomes disturbed as to who Yinka is. Is she cheating?

programme.title: Squatterz S2 Papa The Player
programme.desc: Buchi and Esiri dare Papa to use his dating skills to get a babe to prove he is still in the game and not an old cargo. Papa, in turn, snatches all their girlfriends and teaches them a good lesson.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Rats
programme.desc: Things started disappearing in the apartment, and everyone is a suspect. They think there is a ghost in the house.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S2 Prenup: We Are Family
programme.desc: Justice Babatunde pretended to be sick just to make Uche change her mind from leaving, but she didn't give in. She brought divorce papers for Justice Babatunde to sign if he's not ready to change his mind about nullifying the prenup. She finally left the house when justice wouldn't yield to her request.

programme.title: Squatterz S2 Papa Gets HIV
programme.desc: Tough times don’t last for long, but this seems to be lasting quite long. Papa is at his lowest, and Buchi makes sure he rubs it in and takes advantage of this situation. But is there light at the end of the tunnel for Papa, or would this be the end of him?

programme.title: Squatterz S5 How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Papa’a mother came again and this time all the squatters left the house so she wouldn’t meet them at home. She meets Esiri and realized their initial meeting was just a fluke. They get to know each other and a flirting relationship starts to everyone especially Papa’s disgust. Meanwhile, Sege is still looking for the missing Rachel.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Hot Candles
programme.desc: Esiri brings a money deal that sounded irresistible to Buchi, all he had to do is swallow a new pill in the market by a new pharmaceutical company. Buchi is totally bought over since money is involved; he refuses to listen to the voice of critics. But were they right? Is this Buchi’s big breakthrough?

programme.title: Squatterz S3 The Proposal
programme.desc: Papa became tired of the constant pressure from his mum about getting married and decided to take the bull by the horns. Wedding bells ringing soon or not?

programme.title: Squatterz S6 Everyday People Part2
programme.desc: Shege met one of their old friend Sure Boy. Papa was not ok with Shege involving Sure Boy in the business he's doing because Sure Boy can't be trusted. Shege brought the business partner Bopsy and sure boy home to check all the house furniture and Chinwe can't stop fooling around with him. She made a picture frame of him and she started feeding the picture. Papa planned to rescue Shege from sure boy before he got duped by him.

programme.title: Squatterz S5 Rule Of Engagement
programme.desc: In a bid to get the best out of her boyfriend Papa, Dorothy gave him some life and business hacks. Unfortunately, Papa takes it too far for her liking, and their relationship enters a sinking ship. At the same time Esiri and Raymond are frustrating the life of Danjuma and he devises the perfect plan to get back to them.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S2 Crossroads
programme.desc: GBard, Soji’s superstar friend, came around, and the girls and paparazzi went gaga over him but he came with a legal issue they never saw coming. Sade is facing some difficulties in her career. She leans to her stepmother. The duo learn that documents are meant to be read.

programme.title: Squatterz S6 Titanic
programme.desc: Voke decided to step up their game for the channel by bringing in an idea of making a show with a celebrity but Chinwe was against it because she had a different idea. Voke invited a musician Babson a smooth voice, at first, Chinwe didn't join the video but when she heard the voice she fell in love with the celebrity, which caused Voke to be very jealous

programme.title: Squatterz S4 Thou Shall Not Hold Any Houseparty
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to throw a birthday party which would flout the house commandments Sege gave them. She decides to manipulate her way to get the guys support. Sege caught them having a party in the house when he brought his business partner home, and would have thrown them out if not for a miracle that happened.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Greencard Part2
programme.desc: All that glitters is not gold, Buchi is about to learn this the very hard way.

programme.title: Squatterz S5 Life For Rent
programme.desc: A millionaire blogger contracts Raymond to be her fake boyfriend to deceive her mother. Papa, Sege and Dorothy are party to this deal but they forgot to inform the real players: Kaffy and Rachel

programme.title: Squatterz S5 Let's Get Married
programme.desc: Danjuma reveals the real reason he proposed to pay rent and everyone becomes friends once again. Papa proposed to Dorothy and everyone waited with optimism for her reply, whilst Rachel, Sege’s girlfriend pressures him to propose to her.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S1 Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Shade is not happy with everyone in the house because she thought they forgot her birthday, now they all have to figure out what she wants for her birthday gift. They all came up with different ideas, but only Soji was able to figure it out. Shade wanted to see her dream music artist, STYL PLUS

programme.title: B.O.A.F S1 Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Shade is not happy with everyone in the house because she thought they forgot her birthday, now they all have to figure out what she wants for her birthday gift. They all came up with different ideas, but only Soji was able to figure it out. Shade wanted to see her dream music artist, STYL PLUS

programme.title: B.O.A.F S3 My Brother Is Rich
programme.desc: Tokunbo’s brother Jimoh came to the house with his fiancée with the hope that his rich brother will fund the wedding with millions of naira. He receives the biggest shock of his life.

programme.title: B.O.A.F S3 Mr And Mrs
programme.desc: Sotonye got an ambassadorial deal and was told to bring an investment of 7million naira to be a shareholder. She went to Garba to help her, but he had a condition: She must give him what he has always wanted, Marriage. She unwillingly agreed, but nobody wins in the end.

programme.title: Squatterz S1 Unwanted Visitor
programme.desc: Sege’s aunt, Temi, stays with the squatters and gives them a tough time. The squatters plot a way to get her out of the house without getting on Sege’s nerves.

programme.title: Squatterz S6 Strange But True
programme.desc: Papa got a big surprise of his life, a foreigner Thompson, came into the house asking about Papa and said he's Papa's son. The news didn't settle well with Papa, Shege advised him to get a DNA test to confirm that the boy is really is son. Papa finds a way to bond with the boy and he taught him some Nigeria acts.

programme.title: Squatterz S6 Aliyah's House Of Commotion
programme.desc: Aliyah came home from work and started acting weird, she locked herself in her room everyone tried to talk to her but she chased them out. Voke slept in the corridor for him to be sure of when she would open the door. Aliyah left the house without letting anyone know. They all woke up to start looking for her. They invited a police officer to the house to help them look for her. She came back after a few hours; she told them what happened to her. The officer said he needed to arrest someone, and Chinwe suggested he should arrest Aliyah.

programme.title: Squatterz S1 Buchi And Yinka
programme.desc: Buchi long long-distance girlfriend calls him to say that she was in town and mentions the name ‘Yinka’ in their conversation. Buchi becomes disturbed as to who Yinka is. Is she cheating?

programme.title: Squatterz S6 No Retreat No Surrender Part 2
programme.desc: Shege woke up on Chinwe lap she mockingly explained to him what happened to him, which made him left the place angrily. The fight continues between Shege and Papa. It became a content for Chinwe and Voke. Aliyah agreed to date Shege to end Papa and Shege's quarrel, but it came with a price: Shege must pay a bride price to date Aliyah.

programme.title: Squatterz S3 Hot Candles
programme.desc: Esiri brings a money deal that sounded irresistible to Buchi, all he had to do is swallow a new pill in the market by a new pharmaceutical company. Buchi is totally bought over since money is involved; he refuses to listen to the voice of critics. But were they right? Is this Buchi’s big breakthrough?

programme.title: Prince of Wales Trophy - Prince of Wales Trophy
FEI Icons - Episode 3 - Igrid Klimke
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic names in the equestrian world, German eventer Ingrid Klimke. With her horse Abraxxas, she won two gold medals in team eventing at the 2008 and 2012 Olympic Games. Despite never thinking she would have a career with horses, now she is an extremely successful rider.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 4 - Charlotte Dujardin
programme.desc: Charlotte Dujardin is a british dressage rider, equestrian and writer. She is probably the most successful British dressage rider in history, holder of three Dressage world records and winning major titles in international competitions with only 35 years. She is the Olympic dressage champion at London 2012 and Rio 2016. In this episode, we find out what drives her towards success.

programme.title: Jumping International de Dinard - Grand Prix
programme.desc: The acclaimed CSI5* Grand Prix de la Ville de Dinard is, together with the Derby, one of the top events of the Jumping International de Dinard. Top equestrians from all around the world gather to try their best against the clock in this physically-straining course. Discover the outcome of the Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup - Rotterdam
Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 2
programme.desc: Bruno Chimirri lectures the students on what is needed to become an equestrian pro. He talks about the bond between a horse and rider, how he manages stress at competitions and the mental preparation he undergoes when detecting possible problems in the field. Then, the students get on the reins to practice jumps.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - GP Andalucía - March
programme.desc: The CSI4* Andalucía GP takes place in the main arena of the Sunshine Tour, and it is the 3rd qualifier for the Invitational GP. The 1.55m course counts for the Longines ranking, so all riders are ready to give it their all to improve their international rankings. Watch the best moments of the Andalucía GP 2022 edition.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 12 - Rome Week 1
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Circus Maximus will host the riders from the Longines Global Champions Tour. The best show jumpers are ready for action in the twelfth leg of the championship. Harrie Smolders won in Hamburg but Edwina Tops-Alexander is still on top of the standings. Find out what will happen on this 12th episode of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2021.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 12 - Rome Week 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Rome! Riders get ready to perform for the first time ever in the Circus Maximus, and the magical atmosphere is palpable as horse and rider combinations try out their best performances. However, Uliano Vezzani has prepared the hardest circuit for the occasion, and adding mistakes means staying outside the podium. Relive the best moments of the 12th leg of the Global Champions League 2021.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Polo Club de Chantilly vs Polo Club Düsseldorf
programme.desc: Welcome to the Polo Rider Cup. The ultimate polo club competition has arrived to the Polo Club of Chantilly facilities. This time, it is the turn of the hosts, Polo Club de Chantilly, to face the Polo Club Düsseldorf. Who will be victorious at the start of the competition?

programme.title: Prince of Wales Trophy - Prince of Wales Trophy
FEI Icons - Episode 3 - Igrid Klimke

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Haras de Jardy
programme.desc: The fourth leg of the 2019 Event Rider Masters Series heads to Haras de Jardy, barely 10 minutes away from Paris. Back in 1891, Edmund White created the Equestrian Centre and Stud. This boasts with a 100 year old stable yard and an iconic clock tower. Welcoming dressage and show jumping events as well as the best eventing action, spectators can expect the best of the equestrian world to join in this venue. Relive the best moments of the competition at Haras de Jardy.

programme.title: FEI Jumping European Championship - Italy - Team Competition

programme.title: FEI Awards 2021
programme.desc: More than 300 guests including equestrian legends, National Federations, FEI partners and stakeholders have attended the 13th FEI Awards. Equestrian commentator Steven Wilde has acted as the Master of Ceremonies of this international congregation of the equestrian community. The 2020 Award winners have also been present this year in Antwerp - Ingrid Klimke, Semmieke Rothenberger, Carmen Thiemman, Angelika Trabert, the Ebony Horse Club and more. However, in comparison with last year, this time stars of equestrian sports have been able to celebrate in person, bringing together the equine world to celebrate these achievements. This edition of the FEI Awards is more special as it is the FEI's centennial year and the nominees are of the greatest calibre. Find out how the FEI Awards 2021 went on HorseTV.

programme.title: Longines FEI Nations Cup - 2019 Hickstead Competition
programme.desc: The best riders are getting ready for the Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup of Great Britain happening at Hickstead, for many, one of the toughest challenges. The reigning champions, Ireland, is looking to return to Hickstead and repeat last year's victory, while Sweden is coming in strong after winning their home leg in Falsterbo.Enjoy the full competition of Hickstead in the 2019 Longines FEI Nations Cup edition.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 12 - Rome Week 1
